description: Data-driven platformer animation: maps an entity's motion state (grounded via __onGround, horizontal speed, vertical direction) to a named sheet animation each tick and advances its frames, so a sprite switches idle -> run -> jump -> fall -> land with no hand-wired play param. The land clip is a non-looping one-shot fired on touchdown that holds until it finishes, then returns to idle/run. Each clip name is a param (default to its conventional name; set one to empty to disable that state). No-op for non-sheet sprites; pair with face-velocity for left/right flip. Order it after the collision resolvers.

jump.description: Animation name for airborne + rising (default 'jump'; '' to disable).

fall.description: Animation name for airborne + falling (default 'fall'; '' to disable).

land.description: One-shot animation on touchdown (default 'land'; '' to disable).
